title: euphrasia officinalis f. eglandulosa
intro: Euphrasia officinalis f. eglandulosa, also known as gentianella or small gentian, is a subspecies of the Euphrasia officinalis plant, a type of flowering plant in the gentian family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. Euphrasia officinalis f. eglandulosa can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or dried herb, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
